root.content: Execute full 6-phase refactor: Auto/Callable/Delete, SOT naming compliance, lifecycle purge, gate hardening, first-turn determinism, monolith slicing

children.content: Sequentially delegate implementation by dependency layers: delete legacy pathing/export hoarding, enforce naming/SOT, add memory auto-purge hooks, gate by TaskNode, then split monoliths with compatibility wrappers
Inspect src/lib/auto-commit.ts and report AUTO_COMMIT_TOOLS set in one sentence.
Implement Phase 1 and 2 refactor in src/lib and related modules: remove legacy pathing/export-hoard behavior and enforce deterministic session filename naming; then verify with tsc and tests.
Run TypeScript and test verification after Phase 1/2 refactor changes.
Phase 1/2 refactor implemented and verified with full TypeScript and test suite.
/hivefiver research: investigate remaining gaps for phases 3-6 (lifecycle purge, gate hardening, first-turn determinism, monolith slicing) with evidence-backed file/line mapping.
Deep read-only scan for remaining gaps in phases 3-6 with code evidence and line mapping.
Verify Phase 1/2 completion state, then sequentially execute Phases 3-6
Phase 3: Context Lifecycle & Memory Governance — auto-purge transient memory on task completion, tighten TODO-Pending routing
Phase 4: Flow Governance & Atomicity — refactor auto-commit to TaskNode binding, harden tool-gate with TaskNode UUID validation
Implement Phase 4A/4B/4C TaskNode-bound auto-commit, tool-gate advisory, and knowledge commit task binding with tests and verification
Review Phase 4A/4B/4C TaskNode-bound auto-commit, tool-gate advisory, and knowledge-commit task binding changes for correctness and architecture fit
/hivefiver research: investigate Phase 4A/4B/4C TaskNode-bound auto-commit, tool-gate advisory, and knowledge-commit binding for correctness and architecture fit
Completed code review for Phase 4A/4B/4C scoped files with verification evidence and merge verdict
Re-review Phase 4A/4B/4C fixed scope: verify tool-gate status filtering fix, non-active referenced task regression coverage, and final blocking verdict
/hivefiver research checkpoint: enterprise_architect lane readiness for Phase 4A/4B/4C re-review
